operatingRule: This pack exists to break sameness in the largest resolved-discrete drag cluster by forcing stronger aftermath differentiation.

rows.primaryDifferentiationAxis: Differentiate by what gets assembled or stabilized after the drag
rows.narrativeRisk: Risk of generic empowerment; the post-drag state must feel specific
rows.closureUpgrade: Vary the resolution artifact so discrete drag endings do not all land as the same seal
rows.clusterRule: Differentiate discrete drag atoms by what gets built, aligned, translated, or revealed after the drag, not by swapping labels on the same mechanic.
